title: pityrogramma ferruginea
intro: Pityrogramma ferruginea, also known as the rusty oak fern or rusty maidenhair fern, is a species of fern native to tropical regions of Central and South America. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Pityrogramma ferruginea include the potential treatment of various conditions such as arthritis, digestive issues, and skin problems, due to its ability to reduce inflammation and promote wound healing. Pityrogramma ferruginea can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used in traditional medicine to harness its medicinal properties.
